manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Create one Home Assistant station entry by entering the station details manually. Use address or postal code when the station name is common. Matching candidates: {candidates}

location.title: Use Home Assistant location

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the Régie Essence Québec feed.
error.not_found: No exact station match was found.
error.ambiguous: More than one station matched. Narrow it with address, postal code, or brand.
error.invalid_station: The selected station could not be validated.
error.location_not_set: Home Assistant location is not configured.
error.no_station_with_coordinates: No stations with coordinates were found in the provider feed.

init.title: Integration options
init.description: Choose how often the integration refreshes the station feed. The minimum is 5 minutes.
